name: Keysight Technologies, Inc.
sic_description: Industrial Instruments For Measurement, Display, and Control
summary: Keysight Technologies, Inc. is a global provider of design and test solutions for the computing, communications, and electronics markets. The company offers hardware instruments (spectrum analyzers, oscilloscopes, network analyzers, signal generators, power supplies), software, and services that enable customers to design, validate, manufacture, deploy, and optimize electronic products. Revenue is primarily derived from R&D applications, serving over 40,000 end customers annually across communications, aerospace, defense, automotive, energy, semiconductor, and other industries in over 100 countries.
